mission: Operational technology, digital infrastructure, enterprise care, and healthy pipeline management for Technology, Science & Innovation and cross-ministry beneficiaries.

operations.title: Primary Operations Center
operations.summary: 24x7 NOC, incident intake, runbook enforcement, and service-health reporting for technology services.

operations.title: Enterprise Care Desk
operations.summary: Dedicated care track for internal stakeholders: requests, escalations, and change coordination.

operations.title: Delivery Response Unit
operations.summary: Cross-team response unit accelerating high-priority delivery remediation and blocker removal.

infrastructure.title: Compute Environment
infrastructure.summary: Containerized compute plane for registry, engage, passport, and tooling workloads.

infrastructure.title: Data Persistence Tier
infrastructure.summary: Object storage, database clusters, and backup pipeline for public records and proof bundles.

infrastructure.title: Edge Delivery Network
infrastructure.summary: CDN-backed front-end delivery and DNS management for citizen-facing applications.

emerging.title: AI Copilot Pipeline
emerging.summary: Assistive copilot for internal support workflows with safety rails and content governance controls.

emerging.title: Deep Research Pilot
emerging.summary: Research track evaluating deep research methods for internal knowledge work.

emerging.title: Brain-Computer Interface Review
emerging.summary: Safety, ethics, and interoperability assessment for state-of-the-art assistive devices.
